common.siteDescription: Auto parts trading — OEM, performance, and aftermarket. 4×4, muscle, luxury, exotic, JDM, heavy machinery, classics, EV, and standard passenger vehicles.

experience.headline: We know the difference.
experience.subheadline: Between a part that fits and a part that works. Between OEM and OEM-equivalent. Between a 4×4 lift kit and a daily-driver coilover. Between sourcing and selling.
experience.depthBody: From American muscle internals to commercial earth-mover repair lines. We trade across ten vehicle verticals — each handled by people who know that vertical.
experience.tiersBody: OEM, OEM-equivalent, and aftermarket — with the judgment to know which is right for a given build. We won't quote you an OEM Brembo if a Wilwood BBK is the better answer for your use case.
experience.sourcingBody: Mainstream service parts, hard-to-find imports, and discontinued NOS originals. Depth comes from working in the industry, not from stocking a warehouse.

sourcing.headline: If it exists, we can find it.
sourcing.body: Hard-to-find, NOS, and import-on-request. Sourcing is its own product, not a side note. Our channels reach across the GCC and beyond — for the parts that aren't on a shelf nearby.

inquiryCta.headline: Stop scrolling. Start sourcing.
inquiryCta.subheadline: Tell us the vehicle, the part you need, and how to reach you. We come back with pricing, availability, and lead time.

hero.subheadline: OEM & aftermarket components for heavy machinery, commercial fleets, and industrial applications. Global sourcing, uncompromising quality.

about.headline: Industry experience, not a website.
about.subheadline: We trade auto parts because we know auto parts. From a Hellcat cam swap to a Caterpillar hydraulic line — the depth comes from hands-on work, not a dropshipping login.
about.storyParagraph1: Nitro Plus was built around a simple observation: most parts websites are run by people who've never lifted a hood. We exist for the customer who can tell the difference between a part that fits and a part that works — and wants someone who can stand behind that difference.
about.storyParagraph2: Our base is the UAE; our sourcing reach is GCC-wide and beyond. We supply workshops, dealerships, body shops, fleet operators, and individual owners across the full breadth of the automotive market.
about.whatTradeBody: OEM, OEM-equivalent, and aftermarket parts across the full breadth of the automotive market — from daily-driver service to specialist builds.
about.whatSourcingBody: Hard-to-find, NOS, and discontinued parts. The kind of inquiry that ends with "we'll find it."
about.whatBreadthBody: 4×4, muscle, luxury, exotic, European sport, JDM, heavy machinery, classics, EV, and standard passenger — each handled by people who know that vertical.
about.trustExperienceBody: Direct experience with vehicle systems, not just SKU lists. We know what fits, what doesn't, and what to ask before shipping.
about.trustLicenseBody: Operating under a UAE general trade license. Real entity, real address, real accountability.
about.trustReachBody: Established channels across the Gulf and beyond for parts that aren't on a shelf nearby.
about.ctaBody: Add the parts you're looking for to a quote, fill in the vehicle details, and we'll come back with pricing, availability, and lead time.

contact.headline: Talk to us.
contact.subheadline: Need a specific part, pricing, or sourcing help? Whatever the inquiry — B2B, B2C, fleet, or a one-off restoration — the fastest paths are below.
contact.noMethodsCopy: Direct contact details are being finalised. In the meantime, the quote request flow is the fastest way to send us a specific inquiry.
contact.licenseBody: Nitro Plus Trading operates under a UAE general trade license. Full details available on request.
contact.quoteCtaBody: If your inquiry is about pricing, availability, or sourcing for a specific part, the quote request flow is faster — we capture the vehicle and part details up front.

careers.headline: Build with us.
careers.subheadline: Nitro Plus is built by people who actually know the difference between a part that fits and a part that works. If that sounds like you, get in touch.
careers.trait1Body: OEM, OEM-equivalent, aftermarket — and the experience to know which is right for a given build. Bonus points for sourcing hard-to-find, NOS, or discontinued parts.
careers.trait2Body: Comfortable with B2B (workshops, dealerships, fleets) and B2C (enthusiasts, daily drivers). English and Arabic, written and spoken.
careers.trait3Body: We dig into vehicle systems — Hellcat cams, Patrol lifts, Cat hydraulics — until we actually understand them. If that's how you work, we want to talk.
careers.applyBody: We don't run a rolling listings page. If you think you'd fit, send us your CV directly — we read every one.

shop.headline: Find your part.
shop.subheadline: Browse by vehicle vertical or part system. Add what you need to a quote — we come back with pricing, availability, and lead time.
shop.vehicleSectionSubtitle: Ten verticals — performance, luxury, off-road, everyday
shop.catalogPlaceholder: The product catalog is being populated. In the meantime, the fastest path is to send us what you're looking for via the quote request — we capture the vehicle and part details up front and reply with pricing, availability, and lead time.
shop.productQuoteCopy: Pricing and availability vary by build, fitment, and current sourcing channels. Add this part to a quote and we'll reply with confirmed pricing, lead time, and any fitment notes within one business day.
shop.resultsCount: Showing {start}–{end} of {total, plural, =1 {# product} other {# products}}
shop.emptyStateBody: No products match your filters. Try clearing some filters, or send us an inquiry directly.

quote.headline: Tell us what you need.
quote.subheadline: Vehicle details, the part you're after, and how to reach you. We come back with pricing, availability, and lead time — usually within one business day.
quote.name: Name
quote.partsNeededPlaceholder: e.g. Front coilovers, OEM or BC Racing if available
quote.notesPlaceholder: Anything else we should know — fitment notes, tier preference, deadline, etc.
quote.notesWithItemsLabel: Notes — vehicle details, fitment, deadline, anything
quote.notesWithItemsPlaceholder: Vehicle (year / make / model), fitment specifics, urgency, or any parts not in your basket. Optional.
quote.successEmailSent: We've received your details and will get back to you within one business day.
quote.successEmailFailed: Email delivery is not configured yet, but you can still send the inquiry directly via WhatsApp.
quote.successWhatsappCopy: Want to message us directly? Tap below to open WhatsApp pre-filled with your inquiry.
quote.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

errors.needsItemOrPartsText: Add at least one item to your basket, or describe what you need here

quote.basketSubtitle: {count, plural, =1 {# item} other {# items}} ready to send

footer.description: Auto parts trading operating under a UAE general trade license. Years of hands-on industry experience — not a dropshipping front.
